## Embeddable block

Sepia and bone palette, ink-and-wash medium on aged paper. Hand-drawn
line quality with visible brush weight variation. Illustrative register;
readability prioritized at page scale.

## Clauses

- Sepia and bone palette — counters the model default of saturated
  primaries when no palette is specified.
- Visible brush weight variation — keeps the line work feeling drawn,
  not vectored.
